title: Open Lofting Cliff: non-source docs lane complete
body: Non-source docs/register consolidation lane complete. Preserved repo-continuity historical handoff prose in archive, drained withdrawn open-questions Q-001 into archive, verified Eclipsed source pass reset distilled/napkin with source routes, updated the Open Lofting curation ledger, and strict-hard is now SOFT with zero hard or critical files. Comms-event rotation remains paused.
